text: The surgeon uses the da Vinci robotic system to perform continuous suturing along a fifteen-centimeter intratummy line, holding the needle at the junction of two-thirds and one-third. The needle is aligned by passing it from one robotic hand to another, following principles similar to open surgery.

The surgeon demonstrates the termination of a knot using the Aberdeen technique in da Vinci robotic suturing. The loop within loop method is applied, pulling the non-needle end to lock the knot. The suture is tightened, and the needle end is carefully handled to avoid trapping, completing the termination process.
